scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,worker -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @knowflow/api" "npm run dev -w @knowflow/web" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.dev:worker: cd services/python-worker && (test -d .venv || python3 -m venv .venv) && .venv/bin/pip install -q -r requirements.txt && .venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
